name: Maharajah's Ginger Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream, half and half, sugar and salt in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Bring to simmer, stirring until the sugar dissolves, about 8 minutes.
3. Whisk yolks in a medium bowl to blend.
4. Gradually whisk the cream mixture into the yolks.
5. Return to saucepan.
6. Stir over medium heat until the custard thickens and leaves a path on the back of a spoon when a finger is drawn across, about 4 minutes; do not boil.
7. Strain the custard into a large bowl.
8. Cool to room temperature.
9. Stir stem ginger, syrup and vanilla into the custard.
10. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, or overnight.
11. Process the custard mixture in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions.
12. Freeze in a covered container.
13. Scoop ice cream into bowls.
14. Garnish with mint sprigs and serve.
